text.title: Team Mode CLI Flag (`--team-config` Overlay) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Is the team ≥ 3 devs sharing a baseline AND can they host a central overlay file?

conclusion.verdict: solo or no infra — personal config is enough

text.example: ACME ops author signs overlay v1.2.0 → drops at /etc/faion/team.yaml → dev runs `faion --team-config /etc/faion/team.yaml plan` → signature verified, model whitelist clamped.
